calendar.matters:
Amended Petition For Determination That Proposed Actions Will Not Violate No Contest Clauses In Trust And Will
Off Calendar Jan-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Cynthia Lee for Bernard Gordon (Petitioner). Mary Jane Gordon for Charles Thomas (Respondent).

Ms. Lee stated that her Client was trying to enforce the terms of the trust, that her Client wanted to inquire further into the certainty of the treasury direct account and that there was no dispute as to the real property. Furthermore, Ms. Lee stated that she had no problem with the Trustee's fees provided all the accounts had been transferred to the trust and that it was her Client's understanding that the house went to Tommy and that the other assets went to the other Brother and the Decedent's Sister. Ms. Gordon stated that Mr. MacCleod assisted with the estate planning and that the accounts were never intended to be transferred to the trust. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Clauzel.

Petn. For Determination That Proposed Action Will Not Violate No Contest Clauses In Trust & Will
Off Calendar Oct-08-2008 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Compelling Trustee To Perform Duties, Redress Of Breach Of Trust, Reduction Of Trustee'S Compensation And For Removal Of Trustee And Order Prohibiting Use Of Trust Funds For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Oct-08-2008 Off Calendar
